Journal Article · Biomaterials, 252, 120093

Au2Pt-PEG-Ce6 Nanoformulation with Dual Nanozyme Activities for Synergistic Chemodynamic Therapy/Phototherapy

Man Wang#, Mengyu Chang#, Qing Chen, Dongmei Wang, Chunxia Li*, Zhiyao Hou*, Jun Lin*, Dayong Jin, and Bengang Xing

DOI Paper Code Slides

Abstract

A co-first-authored study of Au2Pt-PEG-Ce6 nanoformulation with dual nanozyme activities for synergistic chemodynamic therapy and phototherapy.

Highlights

  • Develops a dual-nanozyme nanoformulation.
  • Integrates chemodynamic therapy and phototherapy.

Add nanozyme-activity and formulation details here.

Citation

Man Wang, Mengyu Chang et al. Au2Pt-PEG-Ce6 Nanoformulation with Dual Nanozyme Activities. Biomaterials 2020, 252, 120093.
